title: Giro d’Italia Women Stage 2: Elisa Balsamo Proves She Belongs in Pink
content:
A day after Lorena Wiebes was kicked out of the Giro d'Italia, Italian star Balsamo delivers victory to prove she deserves the pink jersey.

Read the full article at Giro d’Italia Women Stage 2: Elisa Balsamo Proves She Belongs in Pink on Velo.
author: ahood
